name: Bran Muffins (Corky)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups All bran or 100% bran cereal
1/2 cup Raisins, chopped dates, or chopped prune
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the bran cereal, prune juice, applesauce, and egg in a large bowl until combined.
2. Let the mixture stand for 5 minutes to allow the ingredients to absorb some of the liquid.
3. Stir in the raisins, chopped dates, or chopped prunes if desired.
4. In another bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon.
5. Add the dry mixture to the bran mixture and stir just until moistened.
6. Grease a muffin pan with Pam cooking spray.
7. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
